acceptanceCovered: PRELAUNCH_MODE=true redirects all routes to /countdown without loop — verified: middleware gate uses === 'true' check; /countdown excluded from redirect; post-fix build confirmed no loop
/countdown route is accessible without authentication — verified: prelaunch gate runs before auth guard in middleware.ts
countdown_date is fetched from app_settings table via service role — verified: get-countdown-date.ts uses SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY with createClient
fallback date used when Supabase is unreachable — verified: get-countdown-date.ts returns FALLBACK_DATE on error or missing data
Days/Hours/Minutes displayed as 2-digit zero-padded LED blocks — verified: countdown-digit-block.tsx uses padStart(2,'0') and clamps at 99; unit tests confirm
timer updates every second via setInterval with cleanup — verified: countdown-timer.tsx setInterval(1000) with return () => clearInterval(tick)
when countdown reaches 0, launched state is shown instead of redirect loop — verified: isLaunched state shows i18n 'launched' message; router.push removed
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY never exposed to client bundle — verified: used only in server-only async function get-countdown-date.ts, no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix
all text uses next-intl i18n — no hardcoded strings — verified: countdown-title uses getTranslations; countdown-timer uses useTranslations; all labels from messages/
force-dynamic on CountdownPage prevents static rendering — verified: export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic' added to app/countdown/page.tsx
unit tests pass for calcTimeLeft and CountdownDigitBlock — verified: 7/7 countdown tests pass (3 calcTimeLeft, 4 CountdownDigitBlock)
npm run build passes with 0 TypeScript errors — verified: build exit 0, /countdown route shown as ƒ Dynamic
npm run lint passes with 0 errors — verified: lint exit 0, 0 errors
regressionChecked: /login route — prelaunch gate has isAuthRoute guard; /login still reachable without PRELAUNCH_MODE redirect
auth flow — middleware order preserved: prelaunch gate → auth guard → session update
existing 22 login tests — all still pass after middleware changes
app_settings RLS — service role usage is server-side only; anon/authenticated paths unchanged
